---
title: Ricardo Ruiz Sánchez
subtitle: 2nd year GIMA student | Environmental Scientist | Laboratory technician
image: media/github_avatar.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: bi-envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:r.ruizsanchez@students.uu.nl
    - icon: bi-linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ricardo-r-s
toc: false # remove "On this page" table of contents
---

Data-driven environmental scientist with a passion for geographical information data. Started collecting data from the laboratory as a technician, I graduated in Environmental Sciences understanding the value of making informed-decisions towards a sustainable future. Along this journey I lived in Scotland and Germany. 


Drafted by the interest on geospatial data I am in my second year of a master in Geographical Information Management and Applications (**GIMA**).

## Education
[{{< iconify zondicons education >}}]{style="color: #179498;"} Msc in Geographical Information Management and Applications


[{{< iconify zondicons education >}}]{style="color: #179498;"} Bsc in Environmental Sciences 


[{{< iconify zondicons education >}}]{style="color: #179498;"} Higher vocational training as Laboratory technician in quality control

## Languages

{{< iconify circle-flags uk >}} English (C1, advance)


{{< iconify emojione flag-for-germany >}} German (B1, intermediate)


{{< iconify emojione flag-for-spain >}} Spanish (Native)
